entity.label: Puah
entity.subtitle: Male
entity.description: One of the two midwives who feared God, and refused to kill the Hebrew male children at their birth (Ex. 1:15-21).

nodes.label: Puah
nodes.description: One of the two midwives who feared God, and refused to kill the Hebrew male children at their birth (Ex. 1:15-21).

verses.text: And the king of Egypt spake to the Hebrew midwives, of which the name of the one was Shiphrah, and the name of the other Puah:
